rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the two redundant .mp/.mpr corollaries of mem_stabilizer_fiber_iff (a clear api-design win if removed to minimize surface). Review 1's additional @[simp] on fiberHomeomorph_one and Review 2's additional fiberHomeomorph_symm are each a valid but independent completeness improvement grounded in the monoid-hom + mul/one lemmas shown in the diff; acting on either yields an essentially equivalent net API.
